description: NY spousal cap exact-boundary — strict greater-than per pseudocode (cap.hit false at exact $241K)
notes: Spec text §6.7.3: payor income exactly at $241K/yr → cap.hit false (strict greater-than per pseudocode; exactly-at-cap is within-cap). Verifies codebase ny-spousal.js boundary semantics: payorAnnual > incomeCapAnnual.
